metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for @prometheus-ags/prometheus-entity-management — entity graph setup, CRUD, GraphQL, realtime, Prisma, and optimization.

plugins.name: prometheus-entity-graph-setup
plugins.description: Introduce the entity graph into React/Vite/Next apps; detect legacy data layers and plan migrations.

plugins.name: prometheus-entity-graph-crud
plugins.description: Generate CRUD surfaces with useEntityCRUD, EntityTable, forms, and registerSchema.

plugins.name: prometheus-entity-graph-graphql
plugins.description: GraphQL hooks, EntityDescriptor normalization, and subscription adapters.

plugins.name: prometheus-entity-graph-realtime
plugins.description: RealtimeManager, WebSocket and hosted adapters, ElectricSQL / local-first patterns.

plugins.name: prometheus-entity-graph-prisma
plugins.description: Prisma schema mapping, REST/Next routes, and optional codegen.

plugins.name: prometheus-entity-graph-optimize
plugins.description: Architecture audits, performance tuning, and graph GC.
